text:

Log:
  Add a patch from upstream that fixes a crash with the trash plugin:

  Panic: file mail-namespace.c: line 709 (mail_namespace_find): assertion failed: (ns != NULL)

  Bump PORTREVISION.

  PR:		217364
  Submitted by:	Max Kostikov
